query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'fcmTokens' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4EV5ivwhyC7eCUY.ebc471170149 --database 4KwtmFvvd67FSFhQ5dyp9H --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'fcmTokens' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	COLUMN_DEFAULT	IS_NULLABLE	COLUMN_TYPE
id	int	NULL	NO	int
userId	int	NULL	NO	int
token	text	NULL	NO	text
deviceType	enum	android	NO	enum('ios','android','web')
deviceId	varchar	NULL	YES	varchar(255)
platform	varchar	NULL	YES	varchar(20)
createdAt	timestamp	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP	NO	timestamp
